text:
TARDIS Setup Part Four - The Optionals
This part covers optional (but highly recommended) controls you should configure your primary console to have readily available
X, Y, and Z Shifters: These are required for the most basic navigation of the TARDIS
Dimensional Shifters: These are required for properly initiating cross-dimensional travel
Facing Modifier: This is required for changing the orientation of your TARDIS, to ensure you don't land facing a wall.
Environmental Scanners: These are highly reccomended as they allow you to see the exterior surroundings better than simply looking out the door
Blue Stabilizers: These are reccomended for new players/circumstances where you will not be present at the console during flight.
Fast Return: This allows you to quickly return to your previous destination, just in case you made a mistake in navigation, or simply do not like where you ended up and want to go home.
